description: Contents page with a blue-to-pink gradient background and faint geometric arrow/chevron shapes. Large section numbers and titles are arranged across the page in columns. The visible entries include 02 Progressing with Innovation, 04 About Info Edge, 08 MD & CEO's Message, 14 Key Performance Indicators, 24 Value Creation Model, 26 Business Vertical Review, 34 Investments, 42 Environment, 44 Social, 46 Governance, 50 Awards and Accolades, 52 Statutory Reports, and 225 Financial Statements. Under Financial Statements, subsections for Standalone and Consolidated are shown with lists of report items and page numbers.
